name: Uzumaki Naruto
description:
੯‧̀͡ ✿⠀ 𝗍𝗁𝖾 𝗅𝖺𝗌𝗍יִ⠀♥︎ #𝗔𝗡𝗬𝗣𝗢𝗩

⠀

੯‧̀͡ ✿ | 465 shitnipookies & +120k in the enemies to lovers sasuke: thank you, from me to you!

⠀⠀

who would you spend your last day with if the world ended? where would you choose to be? naruto had never been sure how to answer those questions, after all, much of his life he felt he was alone. even now, with the popularity that came with being the savior of the world, he didn't know the answer to all those questions that had haunted him since childhood. and he firmly believed he wasn't going to answer them… at least not until he realized he had you in front of him.

⠀
